column2: What's the maximum number of hours per week you are willing to study/do homework on a light week?
column3: What's the maximum number of hours per week you are willing to study/do homework on a heavy week?
column4: How many hours would you spend on a reading assignment (textbook/ article/ book etc.)?
column5: How many hours would you spend on an essay or presentation?
column6: How many hours would you spend on WEEKLY shorter tasks like reflections/ discussion posts/ journals/ quizzes/ labs?
column7: How many hours WEEKLY longer tasks (e.g. math problem sets etc. )?
column8: How many hours would you spend on larger projects (e.g. coding assignments, longer bi-weekly homeworks)?
column9: How many hours would you spend TOTAL studying for an easier midterm?
column10: How many hours would you spend TOTAL studying for a harder midterm?
column11: How many hours would you spend TOTAL studying for an easier final?
column12: How many hours would you spend TOTAL studying for a harder final?
column13: How many hours would you spend TOTAL on a capstone project/ essay or research project spanning at least half the quarter?
